title: Temporary Playground Repair Notice
intent: Coordinate a short resident-facing playground repair window with notice before scheduling, clear boundaries, operator ownership, and a human fallback path.

notes: The repair notice describes a synthetic amenity closure and detour only; it does not identify residents, workers, units, or camera feeds.

fallback.condition: Resident concern, weather, contractor delay, or safety boundary change affects the playground repair window.
fallback.action: Pause scheduling, update the notice, keep an alternate route open, or hand off to a named operator.

artifacts.description: Plain-language synthetic public notice for a temporary playground repair window, boundary, alternate path, and contact route.
